# Copilot Instructions

This file provides workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot for the infinite scroll cat pictures gallery project.

## Project Overview
Building an infinite scroll web page featuring funny cat pictures using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend:** HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (Vanilla)
- **API:** The Cat API (for real cat pictures)
- **Features:** Infinite scroll, lazy loading, responsive design

## Development Guidelines
- Use modern JavaScript (ES6+)
- Ensure responsive design for mobile and desktop
- Implement proper error handling for API calls
- Follow semantic HTML and accessibility standards
- Keep dependencies minimal for a lightweight application
